description: FDS Flow Icons V4 — complete searchable catalogue. Primary icon source for all FDS work. 1,229 icons with CSS names, descriptions, keywords, and Figma node IDs.

iconSelectionProtocol.rule: ALWAYS try FDS Flow Icons first. Only fall back to Phosphor if no FDS icon exists for the purpose.
iconSelectionProtocol.step1: Search allIcons[] by keywords[] or description — find an FDS icon that matches the use case
iconSelectionProtocol.step2: If found: use the FDS icon. Check prefix for correct size and CSS class pattern.
iconSelectionProtocol.step3: If NOT found: use Phosphor Icons as fallback (see phosphorFallback below)
iconSelectionProtocol.step4: Flag the gap: "Icon gap: [description] — no FDS icon for this. Recommend raising with DS team. Placeholder: ic_nav_[nearest-semantic-name]"
iconSelectionProtocol.never: Never use emoji, generic SVG names, Material Icons, Feather, Heroicons, or any other third-party icon library

phosphorFallback.description: Secondary icon source when no FDS Flow Icon exists. Phosphor Icons only — no other fallback.

navUsage.reason: Light weight is clear and refined at 24px — matches FDS nav icon visual weight

badgeUsage.reason: Thin weight is elegant and premium at 48px — pairs with the decorative intent of badge icons

phosphorFallback.importRule: Import only the weight you need — never import all weights
phosphorFallback.flagging: Every Phosphor icon used must be flagged as an icon gap in the build manifest

ic_nav_.use: All UI icons — default for every interface element

ic_badge_.use: Illustrative / feature icons — larger decorative contexts only

sizingRules.rule: FDS uses exactly two icon sizes: 24px (nav) and 48px (badge). Never resize outside these.

rule_twoSizesOnly: FDS icons are 24px or 48px only. Never set font-size to any other value. Adjust wrapper/container for spacing, never the icon itself.

iconGapProtocol.instruction: When no FDS icon covers the need: 1. Check Phosphor Icons (phosphorFallback above). 2. Flag the gap. 3. Never use unlicensed icons.
steps: Search allIcons[] keywords/description — confirm no FDS icon fits
Use Phosphor fallback with correct weight (light for 24px nav, thin for 48px badge)
Flag in build manifest: "Icon gap: [purpose] — no FDS icon. Phosphor fallback used: ph-{name}. Recommend raising with DS team."
Suggest a future FDS name: ic_nav_[semantic-name] or ic_badge_[semantic-name]

ic_nav_.use: Primary UI — actions, wayfinding, navigation (default for all interface icons)

ic_app_.use: App store buttons: App Gallery, Google Play, App Store, QR App

ic_payment_.use: 100+ payment method logos — self-contained SVG data URIs from fds-payment-badges.css

ic_nav_flag_.use: 236 country flag icons for region/language selectors

ic_nav_menu_.use: Bottom app navigation bar only — App platform exclusive

ic_badge_.use: Illustrative/category badge icons — decorative, larger contexts only

ic_nav_ar_.use: RTL Arabic mirrored nav variants — use when dir=rtl

ic_inline_.use: Inline with text: external link, expand, gallery, 360/3D

ic_flightindicator_.use: Flight status: confirmed, delayed, cancelled, rescheduled

ic_alerts_.use: Status indicators: tick (success), warning, error, info — 4 types × 2 sizes
